body:
Cynthia, I looked over the latest version of your plan. The concept is strong and your food cost math is tight. My only worry is the rent on the Hoboken space — at $6,200 a month it eats your cushion fast. Let's talk over coffee Monday.

Frank
snippet: Cynthia, I looked over the latest version of your plan. The concept is strong an...
subject: Rootstock plan — lease numbers

body:
Thanks Frank, that means a lot coming from you. I had the same worry about the Hoboken rent. I'm comparing it against a smaller Jersey City space at $4,800. Monday works — usual spot, 11?

Cynthia
snippet: Thanks Frank, that means a lot coming from you. I had the same worry about the H...
subject: Re: Rootstock plan — lease numbers

body:
11 is good. Bring both lease sheets and your savings timeline. We'll pressure-test the numbers before you talk to any investors.

Frank
